title: Passing Cloudflare Turnstile using two fingers
summary: Here’s a quick tip for passing the infamous Cloudflare Turnstile captcha checkbox pages: press Tab key, to focus the checkbox (I use my index finger) press Space bar, to select the checkbox (I use my thumb) …no mouse movement or clicking needed! ✌️
content:
Here’s a quick tip for passing the infamous Cloudflare Turnstile captcha checkbox pages:

  1. press Tab key, to focus the checkbox (I use my index finger)
  2. press Space bar, to select the checkbox (I use my thumb)

…no mouse movement or clicking needed!

✌️
